text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The svchost.exe process is modifying the Security event log file path to a non-standard and misleading name (C:\\Windows\\System32\\winevt\\Not-Important-Log.evtx) and then writing to it. This is a common defense evasion technique used by attackers to hide their activities by redirecting or obscuring critical security logs.",
  "indicators": [
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\EventLog\\Security\\File",
    "Not-Important-Log.evtx",
    "write",
    "defense evasion",
    "event log manipulation"
  ]
}
